name: leanix-mcp-integration
description: The LeanIX MCP Integration is a Model Context Protocol server that bridges LeanIX's enterprise architecture platform with AI assistants. It exposes LeanIX's GraphQL API as MCP tools, enabling AI assistants like Claude to query and manage fact sheets using natural language and generate and execute GraphQL queries automatically.
